basic_details.job_title: Calcutta University Agricultural Labour Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 50 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The University of Calcutta has issued a recruitment notice dated 14-07-2026 inviting applications from eligible Indian citizens for the post of Agricultural Labour at the Baruipur Agricultural Experimental Farm. This recruitment is being carried out under the University's RUSA 2.0 (Component-10) project, and the engagement is fully temporary and contract-based. Around 50 vacancies have been notified. This article presents an English translation of the official Bengali notice, covering eligibility, nature of work, required documents, selection process, and the application procedure, exactly as

application_fee.details: No application fee amount is mentioned anywhere in the notice. This appears to be a fee-free application process, but candidates should verify this directly with the RUSA 2.0 office, since the notice does not explicitly confirm "no fee" in words.

age_limit.age_details: Fully temporary and contract-based, as per project requirement
age_limit.details: The notice requires applicants to submit an age proof certificate along with the application, but it does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit, or any age relaxation rules, for the Agricultural Labour post.

qualification.details: Applicants must be Indian citizens. Candidates who have passed Class 8 from a recognized educational institution will be given preference. (This is stated as a preference, not stated as a strict minimum qualification requirement in the notice.) Candidates must have a minimum of 5 (five) years of experience in an agricultural field, agricultural farm, agricultural research farm, or similar agriculture-related work. Applicants must submit an experience certificate issued by the Scientist, Principal Investigator, Farm Superintendent, or relevant authority under whom they previously worked. | requirement: Detail
qualification.education_qualification: Not specified as mandatory in the notice

vacancy_details.Institution/Location: Baruipur Agricultural Experimental Farm, University of Calcutta

post_wise_breakdown.institution_location: Baruipur Agricultural Experimental Farm, University of Calcutta

category_wise_vacancy.Institution/Location: Baruipur Agricultural Experimental Farm, University of Calcutta

salary_details.details: Remuneration will be paid as daily wages, as per the prevailing order of the Government of West Bengal. The exact daily wage amount is not specified in the notice.

selection_process: Eligible candidates will be selected through an interview and/or skill test

based on verification of the application and submitted documents. The University of Calcutta's decision in this matter will be treated as final. Vacancies will be filled as per the West Bengal Government's prevailing Reservation Roster.
how_to_apply: Fill out the application form completely, including personal details, present and permanent address, contact details, educational qualification, and agriculture work experience details, as per the prescribed format.

Attach all required documents: age proof, educational qualification certificate (if any), experience certificate, self-attested Aadhar Card/government ID copy, and a recent passport-size colour photograph.

Ensure the experience certificate is issued by the Scientist, Principal Investigator, Farm Superintendent, or relevant authority under whom you previously worked, and sign the declaration confirming this in the application form.

Send the completed application, along with all documents, by post to: Coordinator, RUSA 2.0, University of Calcutta, 87/1, College Street, Kolkata – 700073. Alternatively, the application can be submitted in person at the RUSA 2.0 office.
On the envelope, clearly write: "Application for recruitment to Agricultural Labour post under RUSA 2.0."
Ensure the application reaches the office on or before the last date: 20 July 2026 (Monday), by 4:00 PM. Incomplete applications, or applications received after this deadline, will not be accepted.
No online application process is mentioned in the notice; only postal or in-person submission is specified.
important_instructions: This recruitment is fully temporary, project-based, and contract-based in nature. No claim to a permanent post, regularization, or future employment at the University will be accepted through this recruitment. Vacancies will be filled according to the West Bengal Government's prevailing Reservation Roster. Incomplete applications, or applications received after the stipulated deadline, will not be accepted. Any direct or indirect canvassing by a candidate will be treated as a disqualification. The University reserves the right to amend, cancel the notice, or increase/decrease the number of vacancies, without assigning any reason, if required.

content_sections.heading: University of Calcutta Agricultural Labour Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
University of Calcutta Agricultural Labour Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The notice specifies the vacancy number as approximate ("আনুমানিক"), meaning it is provisional and subject to change. No further break-up by category or sub-location is provided in the source notice.

rows.institution_location: Baruipur Agricultural Experimental Farm, University of Calcutta

content_sections.heading: University of Calcutta Agricultural Labour Recruitment 2026: Eligibility
content_sections.text: Applicants must be Indian citizens . Candidates who have passed Class 8 from a recognized educational institution will be given preference . (This is stated as a preference, not stated as a strict minimum qualification requirement in the notice.) Candidates must have a minimum of 5 (five) years of experience in an agricultural field, agricultural farm, agricultural research farm, or similar agriculture-related work. Applicants must submit an experience certificate issued by the Scientist, Principal Investigator, Farm Superintendent, or relevant authority under whom they previously worked.

rows.detail: Not specified as mandatory in the notice
Passing Class 8 from a recognized educational institution - candidates with this qualification will be given preference

content_sections.heading: University of Calcutta Agricultural Labour Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The notice requires applicants to submit an age proof certificate along with the application, but it does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit, or any age relaxation rules, for the Agricultural Labour post.

content_sections.heading: University of Calcutta Agricultural Labour Recruitment 2026: Salary / Remuneration
content_sections.text: Remuneration will be paid as daily wages , as per the prevailing order of the Government of West Bengal . The exact daily wage amount is not specified in the notice.

content_sections.heading: Nature of Work
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will be required to carry out the following agriculture-related duties at the Baruipur Agricultural Experimental Farm: Land preparation Seed sowing Seedling transplantation Irrigation Crop care Crop harvesting Maintenance of experimental plots and nursery Maintenance of agricultural infrastructure Other agriculture-related duties assigned by the University authorities

content_sections.heading: Tenure of Appointment
content_sections.text: The appointment will be fully temporary and contract-based , for a period as per the project's requirement. The notice explicitly states that this recruitment does not create any claim to permanent appointment, regularization, or future employment at the University.

content_sections.heading: University of Calcutta Agricultural Labour Recruitment 2026: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee amount is mentioned anywhere in the notice. This appears to be a fee-free application process, but candidates should verify this directly with the RUSA 2.0 office, since the notice does not explicitly confirm "no fee" in words.

content_sections.heading: University of Calcutta Agricultural Labour Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates will be selected through an interview and/or skill test , based on verification of the application and submitted documents. The University of Calcutta's decision in this matter will be treated as final . Vacancies will be filled as per the West Bengal Government's prevailing Reservation Roster .

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for University of Calcutta Agricultural Labour Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The application form itself also asks candidates to declare and tick which of the following are attached: age proof, educational qualification certificate, experience certificate, Aadhar Card/government ID, passport-size photo, and any other document specified by the candidate.

rows.document: Self-attested copy of Aadhar Card or any other government-issued ID
One copy of a recent passport-size colour photograph

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for University of Calcutta Agricultural Labour Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill out the application form completely, including personal details, present and permanent address, contact details, educational qualification, and agriculture work experience details, as per the prescribed format. Attach all required documents: age proof, educational qualification certificate (if any), experience certificate, self-attested Aadhar Card/government ID copy, and a recent passport-size colour photograph. Ensure the experience certificate is issued by the Scientist, Principal Investigator, Farm Superintendent, or relevant authority under whom you previously worked, and sign the declaration confirming this in the application form. Send the completed application, along with all documents, by post to: Coordinator, RUSA 2.0, University of Calcutta, 87/1, College Street, Kolkata – 700073 . Alternatively, the application can be submitted in person at the RUSA 2.0 office. On the envelope, clearly write: "Application for recruitment to Agricultural Labour post under RUSA 2.0." Ensure the application reaches the office on or before the last date: 20 July 2026 (Monday), by 4:00 PM . Incomplete applications, or applications received after this deadline, will not be accepted. No online application process is mentioned in the notice; only postal or in-person submission is specified.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: This recruitment is fully temporary, project-based, and contract-based in nature. No claim to a permanent post, regularization, or future employment at the University will be accepted through this recruitment. Vacancies will be filled according to the West Bengal Government's prevailing Reservation Roster. Incomplete applications, or applications received after the stipulated deadline, will not be accepted. Any direct or indirect canvassing by a candidate will be treated as a disqualification. The University reserves the right to amend, cancel the notice, or increase/decrease the number of vacancies, without assigning any reason, if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for University of Calcutta Agricultural Labour Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 20 July 2026 (Monday), up to 4:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many Agricultural Labour vacancies are there at Baruipur Agricultural Experimental Farm?
faq.answer: Around 50 vacancies have been notified. This number is described as approximate/provisional in the notice.

faq.question: Q3. Is this a permanent job at the University of Calcutta?
faq.answer: No. The notice clearly states that this recruitment is fully temporary and contract-based, and it does not create any claim to a permanent post, regularization, or future employment at the University.

faq.question: Q4. What experience is required for the Agricultural Labour post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of experience in an agricultural field, agricultural farm, agricultural research farm, or similar agriculture-related work is required, supported by an experience certificate from the relevant Scientist, Principal Investigator, Farm Superintendent, or authority.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The notice does not specify a mandatory minimum educational qualification. However, candidates who have passed Class 8 from a recognized institution will be given preference.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary or wage for the Agricultural Labour post?
faq.answer: Remuneration will be paid as daily wages, as per the prevailing order of the Government of West Bengal. The exact wage amount is not specified in the notice.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for this post - online or offline?
faq.answer: Only offline application is accepted. The completed form and documents must be sent by post to the RUSA 2.0 Coordinator's office at the University of Calcutta, or submitted in person at the RUSA 2.0 office.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Selection is through an interview and/or skill test of eligible candidates, based on verification of the application and documents submitted. The University of Calcutta's decision is treated as final.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required along with the application?
faq.answer: A filled application form, age proof certificate, educational qualification certificate (if available), experience certificate, a self-attested copy of Aadhar Card or another government ID, and one recent passport-size colour photograph.
